raw.subject: Your Killeen page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you've been sharing some tough diagnoses lately, like that Chevrolet express 3500's A/C blower motor not working due to a harness and resistor burn.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some customers wondering how to get in touch with you directly.

I took a look at your Facebook posts and photos, and I thought your Killeen community might appreciate a dedicated page that showcases your services and expertise. I sketched out a simple homepage idea that includes an emergency call CTA, a list of services you offer, a map of your service area, and even a sticky phone bar so customers can easily get in touch with you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/king-s-mechanic-shop-killeen

If you're interested in exploring how a site like this could work for your business, I'd be happy to discuss the details with you in a quick call or over email. Just let me know, and we can go from there.

Reply to get started.
